title: hymenophyllum coreanum
intro: Hymenophyllum coreanum, also known as Korean rock fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum coreanum include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hymenophyllum coreanum typically involve making a tea or infusion from the plant's leaves, which can be used to treat a range of health complaints.
